posts.raw_content:
We share this planet with many other nations and cultures.

It's OK to have opinions about world politics and take sides with other countries, even if that means military intervention or sanctions.

Those here, who boast about not giving a shit about any conflicts outside our borders, are naive.  

We should all care about the Islamification of Europe and Chinese fishing fleets decimating fish populations off the coast of Peru, among many other international issues.

We don't live in a bubble.
